name: Russia
headline: Russia FLOOR CONFIRMATION at 0.0 / Critical — May 14 documents the largest single-day strike package since the May 9-11 bad-faith ceasefire-format cycle. Conduct accumulation: 1,560+ drones deployed over 24 hours; 670 attack drones + 56 missiles in single overnight attack; 1 killed and 36 injured in Kyiv (11 rescued from collapsed residential building). Combined with May 9-13 cycle (ceasefire prepare + strike-night-1 + sustain-night-2), the May 14 attack establishes a complete post-ceasefire offensive-surge category, now extended into a 4th distinct phase ('large-scale escalation' beyond sustain). Russia's bad-faith ceasefire-format compound conduct profile is now the densest single-window record in the countries-floor cluster. Floor sustained at 0.0; no score change; new conduct documentation added.

AWR.rationale: Floor sustained. Civilian-residential-area targeting on the scale of 670 attack drones + 56 missiles in a single overnight strike establishes anticipatory awareness of foreseeable civilian harm; the state continues to deploy at this scale anyway. A5 anchor 1 confirmed: 'No harm assessment before major decisions.'

EMP.rationale: Floor sustained. No state-level empathic response to documented civilian casualties; Kremlin framing of strikes continues to assert 'special military operation is continuing' (carry-over from May 13 cycle).

ACT.rationale: Floor sustained. AC1 responsiveness: state-level response is escalation, not de-escalation. The May 14 strike package is the largest documented in the post-ceasefire offensive surge — pattern is intensification.

EQU.rationale: Floor sustained. Residential-building targeting (11 rescued from collapsed building) does not discriminate by combatant status; structurally inequitable harm distribution to civilians sustained.

BND.rationale: Floor sustained. B1 consent: Ukrainian sovereignty violation continuous; B3 scope: strikes on residential infrastructure in Kyiv (national capital, distant from front lines) confirm scope-of-violence expansion well beyond any military-objective framing.

ACC.rationale: Floor sustained. No accountability mechanism engagement; ICC arrest warrant for Putin (2023) and subsequent warrants for other officials unaddressed. No documented internal review of civilian-casualty patterns.

SYS.rationale: Floor sustained. S1 causal reasoning: the May 14 attack-package scale (1,560+ drones in 24h) represents a systems-level capability investment in civilian-strike capacity. S2 long-term impact: residential-targeting pattern compounds the post-ceasefire offensive-surge category.

INT.rationale: Floor sustained. I1 consistency under pressure: the May 9-14 bad-faith ceasefire-format compound is a canonical integrity-failure category. Ceasefire announced → preparation under cover → strike-night-1 → sustain-night-2 → large-scale escalation-day-4 (May 14). Integrity dimension scored at floor.

evidence.summary: May 14 large-scale missile + drone attack across Ukraine: 1,560+ drones deployed over 24h; 670 attack drones + 56 missiles in single overnight strike; 1 killed and 36 injured in Kyiv; 11 rescued from collapsed residential building.
Russia Matters Russia-Ukraine War Report Card (May 13): documents post-ceasefire offensive surge; 150+ engagements during declared May 9-11 ceasefire; resumption of mass offensive May 12.
Al Jazeera May 12: Zelenskyy says Russia fired over 200 drones at Ukraine as truce expires — pre-cursor to May 14 large-scale package.

Carry-over: ICC arrest warrants unaddressed; sustained civilian-area targeting pattern.
rationale: Floor sustained. May 14 conduct accumulation adds a new fourth phase ('large-scale escalation') to the post-ceasefire bad-faith ceasefire-format compound previously documented across May 9-13. The 1,560+ drone deployment in 24 hours is the largest single-day capability deployment in the assessment window. No score change from 0.0 floor; conduct documentation updated. Floor-exit criteria not in trajectory — no de-escalation, no accountability engagement, no civilian-protection mechanism implementation.

newConductCategoryNote: The May 14 large-scale strike package extends the May 9-13 bad-faith ceasefire-format compound into a 4-phase structure: (1) announce ceasefire; (2) prepare under cover; (3) strike night 1; (4) sustain night 2; (5) large-scale escalation day 4. This is now a five-phase compound category. The compound is the densest single-window bad-faith ceasefire-format record in the countries-floor cluster.

math_check.validator_check: Floor maintained. May 14 conduct does not affect composite arithmetic.
